title: Korak 6

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should raise a ValueError with the message Director cannot be empty when director is either empty or contains whitespace only.
You should not raise a ValueError when director is a valid string.

description: Kreiraj još jednu izjavu if za proveru da li director nije prazan ili sadrži samo razmake i generiše/izbaci ValueError sa porukom Director cannot be empty.
